title: koanophyllon puberulum
intro: Koanophyllon puberulum is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the velvet leaf. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Koanophyllon puberulum include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Koanophyllon puberulum is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in the form of extracts or tinctures, making it a versatile herbal remedy.
